title: Attendance Clock State Detected Event
description: A target timekeeping system was queried and its current clock state was observed. Orwell should emit this after running a read-only state check.

clock_system.description: Timekeeping integration or system that was queried, for example 'orwell'.

principal.description: Logical worker or account identifier whose clock state was observed.

status.description: Derived current clock state at observation time.

effective_at.description: Timestamp when the observation was made.

source_command_id.description: command_id of the originating attendance.clock.request command, if this event was caused by one.

today_row.description: Raw current-day timesheet row observed during detection, if available.

button_texts.description: Visible clock-action button labels observed at detection time.

failures.description: Portal failure hints observed while reading state, such as missing-punch errors.
